overall.description: A first-person walk through a rainy, neon-lit cyberpunk city street at night. The camera moves along a wet sidewalk beside an elevated transit line, passing pedestrians with umbrellas and large holographic advertisements. The scene features reflective wet pavement, towering industrial buildings, and atmospheric fog characteristic of high-end game engine graphics.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian walkway beside elevated transit line

events.description: begin walking along wet sidewalk next to covered transit structure
slight adjustment to path to avoid oncoming pedestrian with umbrella

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the rain-slicked sidewalk, passing by the elevated transit structure on the right with yellow neon trim

notable_agents.action: pedestrian with dark clothing and umbrella walking toward camera

entered.detail: tall dark building with small illuminated rectangular windows and metallic panels
elevated transit platform with glass windows and yellow neon lighting along the edges
painted yellow tactile paving strip running down the center of the wet sidewalk
network of metal beams and pipes crossing overhead between buildings

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a narrow, rain-soaked pedestrian walkway flanked by a dark industrial building on the left and an elevated transit structure on the right. The camera moves forward through the misty night, passing an oncoming pedestrian with an umbrella while neon lights reflect off the wet pavement.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial street with large holographic advertisements

events.description: massive red curved billboard displaying REAL WARE advertisement becomes visible on left building
tram or vehicle passes by on the right side behind the transit structure glass

agents.ego_description: continuing along the sidewalk, passing multiple pedestrians with glowing umbrellas and cybernetic enhancements

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in yellow jacket holding a red glowing umbrella walking toward camera

entered.detail: massive curved digital billboard displaying REAL WARE and MAN'S SWEET text with muscular figure imagery

segments.scene_description: As the camera progresses, a massive red holographic billboard dominates the left side of the frame. The walkway remains enclosed between tall structures, with the elevated transit line now further to the right. Pedestrians with illuminated umbrellas pass by, and vehicles can be seen moving in the background.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial storefront row with neon signage

events.description: passing by various storefronts with green and red neon signs as the large billboard recedes
passing under bright overhead streetlights creating lens flare effects

agents.ego_description: walking past various shops and pedestrians, maintaining steady pace along the wet pavement

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in white shirt holding a white umbrella walking in same direction

entered.detail: storefront with illuminated Cyberpunk sign and red circular logo
green and red neon sign for an establishment further down the street

segments.scene_description: The large red billboard passes out of view as the camera moves past various commercial storefronts with glowing neon signs. The sidewalk continues alongside the now-distant transit structure, with pedestrians walking in both directions under the hazy night sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: transition to open plaza area with large digital displays

events.description: approaching open plaza area with wider space and more visible sky
slight left turn toward the open plaza entrance

agents.ego_description: turning slightly left while approaching the open plaza, passing a group of pedestrians with umbrellas

notable_agents.action: group of pedestrians with umbrellas walking toward the plaza area

entered.detail: large vertical digital billboard displaying WET DREAM text with anime-style character artwork
wide open plaza area with distant illuminated structures and reflective wet ground

segments.scene_description: The scene opens up as the camera approaches a plaza entrance, with the WET DREAM billboard prominent on the left. The transit structure falls away to the right as the camera turns left toward the open area, revealing more of the night sky and distant city lights across the expansive wet plaza.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a claustrophobic, rain-soaked alleyway that gradually opens into an expansive urban plaza. It begins on a narrow pedestrian walkway flanked by a dark industrial building and an elevated transit structure, moving through the misty night past pedestrians with umbrellas. As the camera progresses, the space feels dominated by a massive red holographic billboard on the left while vehicles blur in the background. The scene then shifts past a series of glowing commercial storefronts as the transit line recedes further to the right, maintaining a steady forward momentum through the hazy air. Finally, the environment opens up as the camera passes a Wet Dream billboard and turns left, leaving the enclosed corridor behind to reveal the wide, reflective surface of a city plaza under the night sky.
